title: Big Globe x GregTech Modern datapack
description: The datapack allows you to spawn ores and oil deposits from the GregTech Modern
body:
- Big Globe v4.10.1 (NOT 4.10.0)
- GTM: v1.6.3

The datapack allows you to spawn ores and oil/gas deposits from the Greg Tech Modern.
Technically, it should work with both Forge and Fabric versions.

_ATTENTION:
It generates little ore in a chunk, but a lot if we consider the heights.
Oil is the opposite.
The datapack does not generate surface ore samples, oil fountains, or trees (yet)_

If you want to see at what heights the ores will spawn, then go to "DON'T TOUCH" (good luck with understanding)
